name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (new)
tagline: The upgraded 3.5 Sonnet that introduced computer use and jumped to 49% on SWE-bench.
metaDescription: The upgraded Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct 2024) introduced computer use, raised SWE-bench Verified to 49.0%, and scored 14.9% on OSWorld. 200K context, $3/$15 pricin…
architecture: Proprietary transformer (non-reasoning); upgraded Claude 3.5 Sonnet with the public-beta computer use API.
note: Upgraded 3.5 Sonnet (claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022): introduced computer use; SWE-bench Verified jumped 33.4% to 49.0%.
overview: The upgraded Claude 3.5 Sonnet, released October 22, 2024 and often called "3.5 Sonnet (new)", was an in-place upgrade to the June 2024 model that kept the same price and speed while substantially raising capability. Its model ID is claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022.

Its headline feature was computer use: a public-beta API that lets Claude perceive a screen and control a mouse and keyboard to operate software like a person. On the OSWorld benchmark for computer use it scored 14.9% in the screenshot-only category (22.0% with more steps), well ahead of the next-best system's 7.8% at the time. On coding it raised SWE-bench Verified from 33.4% to 49.0%, and on TAU-bench it improved to 69.2% (retail) and 46.0% (airline).

This model has a 200K token context window, up to 8,192 output tokens, and supports text and vision input, at $3 / $15 per million tokens. The claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022 snapshot was retired on October 28, 2025; Anthropic recommends Sonnet 4.6 as the replacement.
strengths: Introduced computer use — controlling software via screen, mouse and keyboard
Large coding jump: SWE-bench Verified from 33.4% to 49.0%
Best-in-class OSWorld computer-use score at launch (14.9% / 22.0%)
Improved agentic tool use (TAU-bench retail 69.2%, airline 46.0%)
Same price and speed as the original 3.5 Sonnet
useCases: Early computer-use and UI-automation agents (public beta)
Tool-using assistants in retail and support workflows

pricing.note: Same price and speed as the original Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

faq.q: What is the difference between the two Claude 3.5 Sonnet versions?
faq.a: The October 2024 "new" version (claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022) added computer use and raised coding scores from the June 2024 original, while keeping the same name, price and speed.
A public-beta API capability that lets Claude view a screen and control the mouse and keyboard to operate software, enabling UI-automation agents.
SWE-bench Verified rose from 33.4% to 49.0%, the best of any publicly available model at the time, including reasoning models like o1-preview.
No. The claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022 snapshot was retired on October 28, 2025. Anthropic recommends Claude Sonnet 4.6.
